title: neolitsea minor
intro: Neolitsea minor, also known as the Japanese neolitsea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lauraceae. It is a small to medium-sized evergreen tree native to Japan and parts of China, commonly found in mountainous regions and along streams. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and alleviate symptoms of fever, as well as its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Neolitsea minor can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures for its herbal benefits, including reducing stress, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system.
